Video.summary: Sherianna shares how to effectively use mantras and how they can positively influence your thinking and raise your vibration to match your desires.
Video.title: Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle

Image.alt: Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle
Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle
Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle

Video.summary: Jennifer shares that no matter what you experience, you get to decide how you react to these situations and what role you play in them.
Video.title: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Image.alt: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Video.summary: Steve discusses mindfulness meditation and how those who practice it reduce their stress, increase their contentment, and achieve more
Video.title: How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor

Image.alt: How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor
How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor
How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor

Video.summary: A man wonders if he should look for love while his wife battles dementia and the classic tale of the G spot gets a rewriting. This week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Video.summary: A man falls asleep during sex. Is it a medical emergency? And could testosterone gel be the cure for painful sex in seniors? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Video.summary: Prana Songbird Is A Singer And Performer Who Will Take Your Breath Away. What a fabulous show with the talented, Actor, Singer, Performer and Songwriter who will blow you away about hearing about her journey. Prana brings a style that will touch your soul! Enjoy the show!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Prana Songbird

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Prana Songbird
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Prana Songbird

Get ready to have a good time with the Two Lucys on the Rico No Suave on the Talk Show! You will get a chance to see how they are moving the world with laughter and music! Enjoy the show!

Video.summary: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Video.summary: Raelene S. Weaver, author and TEDx speaker who's breaking barriers by normalizing boys' emotions. Witness a touching moment as a man in Italy feels a human touch after 30 years, and Daaji joins for another inspiring segment on our Soul Hugs series.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code
Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code
Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code

Video.summary: If you thought you knew everything about #PlayToWin...get ready for a wild ride! This one is POWERFUL. Have tissues close by!
Video.title: Play To Win Season 2- Episode 4

Image.alt: Play To Win Season 2- Episode 4
Play To Win Season 2- Episode 4
Play To Win Season 2- Episode 4

Video.summary: To be successful you have to take risks. Sometimes the biggest risk is letting go and becoming someone new. There will only be one winner - but everyone’s life will be transformed. Ready to find out the Season 2 WINNER?
Video.title: Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5

Image.alt: Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5
Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5
Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5

Video.summary: Pilot episode of Resonate With Sara for Season 1
Video.title: Pilot

Video.summary: Stomach aches and pains are a common complaint. Here are the signs that the problem could be serious.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Gastro

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Gastro
Dr. Q&A - Gastro
Dr. Q&A - Gastro

Video.summary: Back pain is one of the most common conditions today but there are treatments, exercises, and therapies that can relieve the pain that don’t involve either narcotics or surgery. But if those interventions are needed you want to make sure you have what you need to make an informed decision
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Back Pain

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Back Pain
Dr. Q&A - Back Pain
Dr. Q&A - Back Pain

Video.summary: Alzheimer’s disease affects millions of people around the world, robbing them of their memory and of so much of their lives. There is still no sure but there are some treatments and active clinical trials that are offering promise. In this program, we discuss some of the lifestyle changes people can make to help prevent or at least slow down the progression of Alzheimer’s and stay as mentally healthy as possible.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Video.summary: Think you need a little nip or tuck? Want answers about fillers or Botox? Need advice about hair loss ? Our expert talks about all that and much more. Plus he highlights a new procedure that can help people who have had suffered traumatic injuries to their limbs.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions
Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions
Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions

Video.summary: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight
Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight
Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions
Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions
Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Video.summary: If you had a chance to close Shawn, could you get it done? Today's the day we see who has the goods. Each team has one goal. Get the contract signed. Shawn is not going to make it easy, but often your audience isn't the hardest part. Sometimes getting out of your own way is the biggest challenge. Prepare to witness a pitch fest for the ages. You'll see that it doesn't matter what you're selling - a Yacht, a Ferrari, a Private Jet...or a Potato - if you don't connect with Shawn, you have no chance.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Video.summary: This is it. A winner will be chosen. The decision is FINAL...But we still have a crowd of candidates that each think they will be the one. Now comes a test of mental toughness. It's all come down to these final moments. Who can convince Shawn that they won't give up when things get...painful. What would you endure for a chance at greatness?...Watch the season finale of Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet
Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet
Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Image.alt: The Principle
The Principle

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.
Video.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Image.alt: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Video.summary: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.
Video.title: The Highest Pass

Image.alt: The Highest Pass
The Highest Pass

Video.summary: The Mark Morris Dance Group works with Parkinson's patients.
Video.title: Capturing Grace

Image.alt: Capturing Grace
Capturing Grace

Video.summary: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.
Video.title: Episode 1

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
